rules.rule_text:
rule linux_kernel_module : info linux lkm
{
	meta:
		author = "@h3x2b <tracker@h3x.eu>"
		description = "Detects LKM - Linux kernel module"

	strings:
		$lkm_00 = "addressable_init_module"
		$lkm_01 = "addressable_cleanup_module"
		$lkm_02 = "vermagic="
		$lkm_03 = "retpoline="
		$lkm_04 = "depends="
		$lkm_05 = "name="
		$lkm_06 = "license="
		$lkm_07 = "author="
		$lkm_08 = "description="

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) == 0x7f454c46 and 5 of ( $lkm_* )
}

rule_metadata.name: linux_kernel_module_embedded
rule_metadata.author: @h3x2b <tracker@h3x.eu>
rule_metadata.description: Detects LKM - Linux kernel module embedded within the file which is not elf itself

rules.rule_text:
rule linux_kernel_module_embedded : info linux lkm
{
	meta:
		author = "@h3x2b <tracker@h3x.eu>"
		description = "Detects LKM - Linux kernel module embedded within the file which is not elf itself"

	strings:
		$lkm_00 = "addressable_init_module"
		$lkm_01 = "addressable_cleanup_module"
		$lkm_02 = "vermagic="
		$lkm_03 = "retpoline="
		$lkm_04 = "depends="
		$lkm_05 = "name="
		$lkm_06 = "license="
		$lkm_07 = "author="
		$lkm_08 = "description="

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) != 0x7f454c46 and 5 of ( $lkm_* )
}
